app.title: Meeting OS
app.subtitle: Turn company meetings into accountable execution.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your workspace, team, and preferences.

users.title: Team members
users.description: Manage who has access to this workspace.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose how you want to receive updates.
notifications.emailDescription: Receive task reminders and meeting summaries by email.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect with the tools your team already uses.
integrations.whatsappDescription: Send meeting summaries and task reminders via WhatsApp.
integrations.emailDescription: Automatically forward summaries to team inboxes.
integrations.slackDescription: Post decisions and tasks to Slack channels.

settings.checkPrompt: Run the connection test to verify the configured keys.
settings.connectionIssues: One or more services need attention.
settings.serviceCheckHint: Run the connection test to verify this service.

common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

invite.title: You've been invited
invite.description: You have been invited to join a workspace.

billing.title: Billing
billing.confirmCancel: Cancel your subscription? You will keep access until the end of the current billing period.
billing.choosePlanSubtitle: Select the plan that best fits your team's needs. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.
billing.securePayment: All payments are securely processed via Moyasar. We support Visa, Mastercard, Mada, and Apple Pay.
billing.expiredBannerDetail: Recording and uploading are disabled. You can still view past meetings. Upgrade to restore full access.

callback.pleaseWait: Please wait while we confirm your payment.
callback.successDescription: Your subscription is now active. You can start using all features immediately.
callback.failedDescription: We couldn't process your payment. Please try again or use a different payment method.
callback.processingDescription: Your payment is being processed. This usually takes a few moments. You can check your subscription status in settings.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple plans for teams of every size.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.quotaEmpty: Your monthly balance is exhausted. Recording is blocked until the next cycle.
dashboard.quotaMeetingsEmpty: You've reached the monthly meeting limit for your plan.
dashboard.upgradePrompt: Upgrade your plan to continue recording.

recording.pausedHelp: Recording is paused. Resume when the meeting continues; this stays in the same meeting.
recording.savedHint: The meeting transcript is saved. You can safely leave this screen or generate the summary and tasks.
recording.summarizing: Generating transcript, summary, decisions, and tasks...
recording.draftRestored: A local transcript draft was restored. Save it to keep it in the dashboard.
recording.speaker: Speaker {id}
recording.systemAudioOff: System audio is not available. Only microphone audio is being captured.
recording.remoteDescription: Share the meeting with system audio to capture remote participants.
recording.remoteDetail: Best for Zoom, Meet, Teams, or any online company meeting.
recording.micDescription: Use the microphone when you are physically inside the meeting room.
recording.micDetail: Best for in-person meetings around the same table.
recording.startingHelp: Approve the microphone or screen-share prompt to begin. If it stays stuck, cancel and try microphone only.
